TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Quzi, title = Quzi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quzi} }

S.FORM: Quzi Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Quzi a niyaro', 119 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 294 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 54% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 158 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 46% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 136 ko tamdaw.
S.PHON: *o~u~u*i itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *o~u~u*i a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: Quzi Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Quzi a niyaro', 119 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 294 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 54% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 158 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 46% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 136 ko tamdaw.
S.PHON: *o~u~u*i itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *o~u~u*i a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
